mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film) AS film_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer) AS customer_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental) AS rental_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payment) AS total_revenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE return_date IS NULL AND rental_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days') AS overdue_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actor) AS actor_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory) AS inventory_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store) AS store_count

SELECT c.category_id, c.name AS category_name, COUNT(p.payment_id) AS rental_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_sales, ROUND(AVG(p.amount), 2) AS avg_sale, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(p.amount) DESC) AS rank FROM category c JOIN film_category fc ON c.category_id = fc.category_id JOIN film f ON fc.film_id = f.film_id JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC

SELECT s.store_id, a.address, a.district, COUNT(p.payment_id) AS transaction_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_sales, ROUND(AVG(p.amount), 2) AS avg_transaction FROM store s JOIN address a ON s.address_id = a.address_id JOIN inventory i ON s.store_id = i.store_id JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id GROUP BY s.store_id, a.address, a.district ORDER BY total_sales DESC

SELECT f.film_id, f.title, f.rating, f.rental_rate, f.length, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(r.rental_id) DESC) AS rank FROM film f JOIN inventory i ON f.film_id = i.film_id JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id GROUP BY f.film_id, f.title, f.rating, f.rental_rate, f.length ORDER BY rental_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.actor_id, a.first_name || ' ' || a.last_name AS actor_name, COUNT(fa.film_id) AS film_count, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(r.rental_id) DESC) AS rank FROM actor a JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id JOIN inventory i ON fa.film_id = i.film_id JOIN rental r ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name ORDER BY rental_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM payment_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM(amount) AS revenue, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_transaction FROM payment WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) = #{year} GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM payment_date) ORDER BY month

SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, COUNT(DISTINCT r.rental_id) AS rental_count, COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_id) AS payment_count, SUM(p.amount) AS total_spent, MAX(r.rental_date) AS last_rental_date, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY SUM(p.amount) DESC) AS quartile FROM customer c LEFT JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON c.customer_id = p.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email ORDER BY total_spent DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{limit}
